en: You know, do I need to drop back and replace Jan Mas on defense?
Or, you know, should I attack like Jamie?
Or, you know, or do I lend Roy here a piece of gum because his breath smells like dookie?
Complete hypothetical. Don't worry. You're fine. You're fine. All right.
ko: 완전 가상의 상황이야, 걱정하지 마, 괜찮아.

en: You got to be able to jump in anywhere at any time and the way to do that
well is to understand and appreciate everyone's position and every position's function.
That's why we got our man Beard replacing Will today as our kit man.
ko: 그래서 오늘 우리 키트 매니저로 윌을 대신해 비어드를 데려왔어.

en: Yeah. So when we get out here and we scrimmage, y'all are going to be swapping positions with someone else.
Yeah. For example, you know, Isaac, we're going to move you up to forward and Danny, we're going to drop you back to defense.
Got it? I'm going to be Danny Rojas. That's right, Isaac. And Danny is going to be you.
Make sense? We're going to fucking rock this. Ay, Dios Mios.
Y'all don't need to do the voices. Oh, OK. All right.
ko: 아니, 너희는 목소리 흉내 낼 필요 없어. 오!

en: Y'all can do the voices. Yeah. Go ahead, bro. Help him out here.
Roy's now going to be handing out a piece of paper that's got someone's name on it.
ko: 로이가 이제 누군가의 이름이 적힌 종이를 나눠줄 거야.
